# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent none
    
    options {
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        timeout(time: 1, unit: 'HOURS')
        timestamps()
    }
    
    parameters {
        choice(name: 'ENVIRONMENT', choices: ['development', 'staging'], description: 'Target environment for deployment')
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_TESTS', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip test execution')
        booleanParam(name: 'FORCE_DEPLOY', defaultValue: false, description: 'Force deployment even if tests fail')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Security Check') {
            agent { label 'build-agent' }
            steps {
                script {
                    if (env.NODE_NAME == 'master' || env.NODE_NAME == 'built-in') {
                        error("SECURITY VIOLATION: Pipeline attempted to run on master node. This is prohibited for security reasons.")
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Checkout') {
            agent { label 'build-agent' }
            steps {
                checkout scm
                script {
                    env.GIT_COMMIT_SHORT = sh(returnStdout: true, script: 'git rev-parse --short HEAD').trim()
                    env.BUILD_VERSION = "${env.BUILD_NUMBER}-${env.GIT_COMMIT_SHORT}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            agent { label 'build-agent' }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Building version ${env.BUILD_VERSION}"
                    sh '''
                        mkdir -p build
                        echo "Build artifacts for version ${BUILD_VERSION}" > build/artifact.txt
                    '''
                }
                stash includes: 'build/**', name: 'build-artifacts'
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            agent { label 'build-agent' }
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running tests on isolated agent"
                    sh '''
                        mkdir -p test-results
                        echo "Test results" > test-results/results.xml
                    '''
                }
                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: 'test-results/*.xml'
            }
        }
        
        stage('Security Scan') {
            agent { label 'build-agent' }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running security scans on isolated agent"
                    sh '''
                        mkdir -p security-reports
                        echo "Security scan results" > security-reports/scan.txt
                    '''
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Development') {
            agent { label 'deploy-agent' }
            when {
                expression { return params.ENVIRONMENT == 'development' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    unstash 'build-artifacts'
                    withCredentials([
                        usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'dev-deploy-credentials', 
                                       usernameVariable: 'DEPLOY_USER', 
                                       passwordVariable: 'DEPLOY_PASS')
                    ]) {
                        sh '''
                            echo "Deploying to development environment"
                            echo "Using credentials for user: ${DEPLOY_USER}"
                            ls -la build/
                        '''
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Staging') {
            agent { label 'deploy-agent' }
            when {
                expression { return params.ENVIRONMENT == 'staging' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    unstash 'build-artifacts'
                    withCredentials([
                        usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'staging-deploy-credentials', 
                                       usernameVariable: 'DEPLOY_USER', 
                                       passwordVariable: 'DEPLOY_PASS')
                    ]) {
                        sh '''
                            echo "Deploying to staging environment"
                            echo "Using credentials for user: ${DEPLOY_USER}"
                            ls -la build/
                        '''
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Production Approval') {
            agent none
            when {
                branch 'main'
            }
            steps {
                timeout(time: 24, unit: 'HOURS') {
                    input message: 'Deploy to Production?', 
                          ok: 'Deploy',
                          submitter: 'admin,release-manager'
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            agent { label 'production-deploy-agent' }
            when {
                branch 'main'
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    unstash 'build-artifacts'
                    withCredentials([
                        usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'prod-deploy-credentials', 
                                       usernameVariable: 'DEPLOY_USER', 
                                       passwordVariable: 'DEPLOY_PASS'),
                        file(credentialsId: 'prod-ssh-key', variable: 'SSH_KEY_FILE')
                    ]) {
                        sh '''
                            echo "Deploying to production environment"
                            echo "Using credentials for user: ${DEPLOY_USER}"
                            chmod 600 ${SSH_KEY_FILE}
                            ls -la build/
                        '''
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Smoke Tests') {
            agent { label 'test-agent' }
            when {
                branch 'main'
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running smoke tests on isolated test agent"
                    sh '''
                        echo "Executing smoke tests against deployed environment"
                        sleep 5
                        echo "Smoke tests passed"
                    '''
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "Pipeline completed successfully for version ${env.BUILD_VERSION}"
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "Pipeline failed for version ${env.BUILD_VERSION}"
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                echo "Pipeline execution completed on secure isolated agents"
            }
        }
    }
}
